mapper.select: SELECT user.id, user.nickname, user.birthday, user.gender, MAX(CASE WHEN ui.identity = 1 THEN ui.identifier END) AS username, MAX(CASE WHEN ui.identity = 2 THEN ui.identifier END) AS phone, MAX(CASE WHEN ui.identity = 3 THEN ui.identifier END) AS email FROM user LEFT JOIN user_identity ui ON user.id = ui.user_id WHERE user.id = #{userId} GROUP BY user.id;
